name: Boya Omic-U 2 Person Wireless Microphone System with USB-C Connector for Mobile Devices
description: Capture audio in your next two-person vlog for YouTube or Tiktok livestream with your compatible iOS or Android mobile device using the black OMIC-U 2-Person Wireless Microphone System from BOYA.

features.Key Features: For Content Creation | 2-Person Shoots with Mobile Devices | 2 x Transmitters with Built-In Mic | Dual-Channel USB-C Plug-In Receiver | 164' Transmission Distance | Intelligent Noise Cancellation | Charging Case, 5-Hour Battery Life
features.What's In The Bo: BOYA OMIC-U 2-Person Wireless Microphone System with USB-C Connector for Mobile Devices (Black) | 2 x Transmitter | Plug-In Receiver | Charging Case | 2 x Furry Windscreen | USB-A to USB-C Cable
